Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20501 0 0}{f 5 21 1 104}Welcome. If you want to make an impression, accessorizing is a must.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20504 0 0}{f 5 21 1 104}Come by any time you need a little sparkle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20503 0 0}{f 5 21 1 104}By the way, I just got a designer pair of glasses in stock.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 104}Not only are they hip, they even work with a more feminine style. Well, if you can spare 150,000 yen, that is...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 104}Although, if you bring me a {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}, I may be able to... adjust the price.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 104}It's an extremely rare collector's item, you see...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 104}Anyway, it's up to you how much you're willing to give up for these glasses.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 104}Huh...? You don't happen to have a {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}, by any chance, do you?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 104}If you'd be willing to part with that...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20502 0 0}{f 5 21 1 104}I'll sell you those glasses for only 10,000 yen. What do you say?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 104}Oh? I see you got your hands on a {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 104}I won't force you, but if you're willing to hand that over...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20502 0 0}{f 5 21 1 104}I'll sell you those glasses for just 10,000 yen. What do you say?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20504 0 0}{f 5 21 1 104}Thanks. Why don't you take the glasses at a discount, then.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 104}Go ahead and have a look around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 104}I see... Well, it's your choice.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20503 0 0}{f 5 21 1 104}Go on and have a look at our products.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I buy these Designer[n]Glasses for 10,000 yen...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I buy these Designer[n]Glasses for 150,000 yen...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 104}If you can just bring me a {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}, I'll give you a discount on those glasses.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 104}Of course, you could also just buy them at the regular price. It's up to you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20504 0 0}{f 5 21 1 104}Thank you for your business.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20505 0 0}{f 5 21 1 104}Hmmm... Looks like you're a little short on change. Come back when you can afford it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20501 0 0}{f 5 21 1 104}Oh, it's you. I'll give you a discount on those glasses.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 104}Go on and have a look at our products.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 4 1 37 1 0}... I wonder[n]if it's some kind of gemstone...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the Shadows[n]in Tartarus drop gems sometimes...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 0 1 2}Elizabeth{f 0 1 27} might know something about it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 4 1 37 1 0}...[n]Elizabeth already told me about it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If I recall, she said that the {f 0 1 2}Lustful Snakes{f 0 1 27} on[n]the higher floors of the {f 0 1 2}Arqa{f 0 1 27} block have it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should try checking the next[n]time I go to Tartarus...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20502 0 0}{f 5 21 1 104}Go on and have a look at our products.[n]{f 1 1}
